summary: Purchase Order management application with invoice number field. Forms auto-clear on page load for fresh data entry.

existing_features.title: Reset all form fields to blank/empty defaults automatically when each form/modal mounts, so no pre-populated values appear on page load or when opening a form for new entry. This applies to all forms across the application including: Create Purchase Order (PurchaseOrderFormModal), Record Sale (RecordSaleModal), Add/Edit Supplier (SupplierFormModal), Add/Edit Staff (StaffFormModal), Add/Edit Customer (RegisterCustomerModal), Add Expense, and Shift Form (ShiftFormModal). Saved records in the database must not be deleted — only the form input fields are reset.

new_feature_requests.summary: Auto-clear all form fields on page load so forms start blank with no pre-populated values (saved records unaffected)
